에베소서 4:1.content: I therefore, the prisoner in the Lord, beg you to walk worthily of the calling with which you were called,

에베소서 4:2.content: with all lowliness and humility, with patience, bearing with one another in love,

에베소서 4:3.content: being eager to keep the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace.

에베소서 4:4.content: There is one body and one Spirit, even as you also were called in one hope of your calling,

에베소서 4:5.content: one Lord, one faith, one baptism,

에베소서 4:6.content: one God and Father of all, who is over all and through all, and in us all.

에베소서 4:7.content: But to each one of us, the grace was given according to the measure of the gift of Christ.

에베소서 4:8.content: Therefore he says, “When he ascended on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts to people.”

에베소서 4:9.content: Now this, “He ascended”, what is it but that he also first descended into the lower parts of the earth?

에베소서 4:10.content: He who descended is the one who also ascended far above all the heavens, that he might fill all things.

에베소서 4:11.content: He gave some to be apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, shepherds and teachers;

에베소서 4:12.content: for the perfecting of the saints, to the work of serving, to the building up of the body of Christ,

에베소서 4:13.content: until we all attain to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to a full grown man, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ,

에베소서 4:14.content: that we may no longer be children, tossed back and forth and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the trickery of men, in craftiness, after the wiles of error;

에베소서 4:15.content: but speaking truth in love, we may grow up in all things into him who is the head, Christ,

에베소서 4:16.content: from whom all the body, being fitted and knit together through that which every joint supplies, according to the working in measure of each individual part, makes the body increase to the building up of itself in love.

에베소서 4:17.content: This I say therefore, and testify in the Lord, that you no longer walk as the rest of the Gentiles also walk, in the futility of their mind,

에베소서 4:18.content: being darkened in their understanding, alienated from the life of God because of the ignorance that is in them, because of the hardening of their hearts.

에베소서 4:19.content: They, having become callous, gave themselves up to lust, to work all uncleanness with greediness.

에베소서 4:20.content: But you didn’t learn Christ that way,

에베소서 4:21.content: if indeed you heard him, and were taught in him, even as truth is in Jesus:

에베소서 4:22.content: that you put away, as concerning your former way of life, the old man that grows corrupt after the lusts of deceit,

에베소서 4:23.content: and that you be renewed in the spirit of your mind,

에베소서 4:24.content: and put on the new man, who in the likeness of God has been created in righteousness and holiness of truth.

에베소서 4:25.content: Therefore putting away falsehood, speak truth each one with his neighbor. For we are members of one another.

에베소서 4:26.content: “Be angry, and don’t sin.” Don’t let the sun go down on your wrath,

에베소서 4:27.content: and don’t give place to the devil.

에베소서 4:28.content: Let him who stole steal no more; but rather let him labor, producing with his hands something that is good, that he may have something to give to him who has need.

에베소서 4:29.content: Let no corrupt speech proceed out of your mouth, but only what is good for building others up as the need may be, that it may give grace to those who hear.

에베소서 4:30.content: Don’t grieve the Holy Spirit of God, in whom you were sealed for the day of redemption.

에베소서 4:31.content: Let all bitterness, wrath, anger, outcry, and slander be put away from you, with all malice.

에베소서 4:32.content: And be kind to one another, tender hearted, forgiving each other, just as God also in Christ forgave you.
